messages.content:
Dear Rinku/Khusboo/Harsh & Prashant - we are planning a full family (I, Payal garimaa, riddhimaa, Mahesh and Meenu) trip to Rourkela. The plan is to reach there by Fri 15 Feb early morning and leave from there on Sun 17 Feb night. Pls let us know if u people can join us there.

U can call/sms me on 9903800354 or reach Mahesh on 9903941156.
